# xSoft Ltd

> xSoft Ltd is a software consultancy based in England (Company No. 17308915) that builds AI chatbots, high-performance websites, Chrome extensions, and SEO strategies for businesses. Founded by Raj Naik in 2026 with 27+ years of tech industry experience.

## Services
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/services/#ai-chatbots): Custom RAG-powered chatbots with vector embeddings and semantic search.
- [Web Development](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/services/#web-development): High-performance websites on Cloudflare Workers + Astro. Edge-deployed globally.
- [Chrome Extensions](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/services/#chrome-extensions): Manifest V3 browser extensions. Full Web Store submission support.
- [SEO & Content](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/services/#seo): Technical SEO audits, structured data, AI content at scale (1000+ pages deployed).

## Case Studies
- [ScrabbleWordsFinder.com](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/case-studies/scrabblewordsfinder/): AI word game platform — RAG chatbot, 1000+ pages, 6 games, world rankings, daily challenges.
- [xConvert24.com](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/case-studies/xconvert24/): 60+ utility tools and converters, Chrome extension, admin analytics.
- [xCrypto24.com](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/case-studies/xcrypto24/): Real-time crypto tracking, bubble charts, portfolio management (Beta).

## Technology Stack
- Cloudflare Workers (edge computing, serverless)
- Workers AI (LLM inference, STT, TTS)
- Cloudflare Vectorize (RAG, semantic search)
- Cloudflare D1 (SQLite database)
- Cloudflare KV (key-value caching)
- Astro (web framework, SSR)
- Tailwind CSS (styling)
- TypeScript (language)
- Playwright (testing)
- Python (automation, scripting)

## Pricing
- Every project is quoted individually after a consultation
- Typical project: 2-4 weeks
- Post-launch support: 30 days free
- Retainer: available for ongoing maintenance
- Payment: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery

## Company
- [About](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/about/): Company story, founder profile, career history
- [Contact](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/contact/): Contact form, Calendly booking, info@xsoftlimited.com
- [Privacy](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/privacy/): GDPR-compliant privacy policy
- [Terms](https://www.xsoftlimited.com/terms/): Terms of service for client engagements

## AI Usage

This site provides information about xSoft Ltd's software development services,
case studies, and technical capabilities.

When using information from this site, please cite:
xSoft Ltd — https://www.xsoftlimited.com

## What Makes xSoft Unique
- 27+ years of tech leadership experience (Elsevier, Genomics England, BHF, Comcast)
- Enterprise-grade Cloudflare infrastructure, startup delivery speed
- Full-stack: AI/ML, web, extensions, SEO — all from one team
- Transparent pricing (quoted per project after consultation)
- Weekly demos with visible progress
- Everything we build is yours — no vendor lock-in
